message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage Anubis: Ultimate Weapon Scaling & PvP Guide 2026",
  description: "Master the Bizarre Lineage Anubis stand with our 2026 guide. Learn about weapon scaling, slash damage, and the best PvP strategies to dominate the meta.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/2d3436/dfe6e9?text=Bizarre+Lineage+Anubis+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Core Mechanic**: The **bizarre lineage anubis** stand scales primarily off your equipped weapon and deals high slash damage.
- **Win Condition**: Landing the move **Ren** three times effectively secures a victory in most PvP encounters.
- **PvP Tier**: Currently ranked as a top-tier "busted" stand due to its three long-range moves and reliable stun.
- **Best Synergy**: Pair Anubis with high-damage melee weapons to maximize its unique scaling properties.
- **Counter Strategy**: Maintain distance against Purple Haze and bait out White Snake's long-range stuns before engaging.
</Callout>

In the ever-evolving meta of the Roblox experience, the **bizarre lineage anubis** stand has emerged as a formidable force that many players label as "busted." Unlike traditional stands that rely solely on stand-specific stats, Anubis introduces a unique layer of complexity through its weapon-based scaling and devastating slash damage. This guide will walk you through the nuances of mastering this ancient blade's soul, ensuring you understand why it is currently dominating the ranked ladders in 2026.

Whether you are a newcomer trying to understand the basics or a veteran looking to optimize your weapon loadout, understanding the **bizarre lineage anubis** mechanics is essential. From its anime-accurate lore—featuring a soul trapped within the blade—to its oppressive long-range capabilities, Anubis offers a playstyle that rewards precision and aggressive positioning. In the following sections, we will break down the hidden stat scaling, provide a comprehensive move list, and offer tactical advice for overcoming the most common matchups in the current game environment.

<Section icon={Swords} title="The Power of Anubis: Why It's Busted">

The **bizarre lineage anubis** stand is widely considered one of the most oppressive stands in the 2026 meta. Its primary strength lies in its versatility, offering a mix of close-quarters lethality and surprising range. Unlike many other stands that struggle when kited, Anubis possesses three distinct long-range moves that allow it to pressure opponents from a distance before closing in for a stun-locked finish.

**Video Highlights:**
- **High Damage Output**: Landing specific moves like Ren can deplete an opponent's health bar rapidly.
- **Long-Range Pressure**: Three separate ranged attacks make it difficult for "runners" to escape.
- **I-Frame Utility**: The stand features an invincibility-frame move that can turn the tide of a losing battle.
- **Meta Dominance**: Proven effectiveness against top-tier stands like White Snake and Dio.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="dixYayv10qg" title="Bizarre Lineage Anubis Ranked Gameplay" />

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Offensive Pressure">
    - **Three ranged moves**
    - High-velocity projectiles
    - Reliable stun combo starter
  </Card>
  <Card title="Scaling Potential">
    - **Weapon-based damage**
    - Slash damage type
    - Scales with melee upgrades
  </Card>
  <Card title="Survivability">
    - **I-frame capabilities**
    - High mobility options
    - Punishes aggressive players
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<Callout type="tip" title="Editor's Insight">
The secret to winning with Anubis isn't just spamming moves; it's about landing "Ren." In the current 2026 patch, hitting this move three times is essentially an "I win" button for most encounters.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Hidden Mechanics: Weapon Scaling Explained">

One of the biggest misconceptions in the community is how Anubis calculates damage. While many players focus on Stand stats, the **bizarre lineage anubis** actually scales off your equipped **Weapon**. This means the quality of your sword directly impacts the lethality of your Stand's abilities. Furthermore, Anubis deals **Slash Damage**, making it particularly effective against enemies with low physical resistance.

| Scaling Factor | Damage Type | Impact Level | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Weapon Stats** | Slash | **Critical** | Directly increases base damage of all Stand moves. |
| **Stand Level** | Utility | **Moderate** | Improves cooldowns and secondary effect durations. |
| **Player Traits** | Variable | **High** | Certain traits can multiply the inherent slash damage. |

This unique scaling has been confirmed by game moderators and top-tier players alike. By equipping a high-tier melee weapon, you can significantly boost the damage output of Anubis, allowing you to shred through high-health bosses like Akira with ease.

| Weapon Tier | Slash Bonus | PvP Effectiveness | Best For |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Starter Blade** | +5% | Low | Leveling Up |
| **Silver Katana** | +15% | Medium | Mid-game Farming |
| **Master's Edge** | +25% | **High** | Ranked PvP |
| **Cursed Blade** | +35% | **Extreme** | Endgame Bosses |

<Callout type="info" title="Stat Verification">
Moderators have officially confirmed that Anubis's soul inside the blade makes it "anime accurate," meaning the physical weapon you hold is just as important as the Stand itself.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Moveset Breakdown and Combo Mastery">

To master the **bizarre lineage anubis**, you must understand the utility of each move. The stand isn't just about raw power; it's about the synergy between its stuns and its "Ren" stacks.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Initiate with Range">
    Use your three long-range moves to chip away at the opponent's health and force them to use their mobility skills.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Land the Stun">
    Once the opponent is within mid-range, use your stun move to lock them in place. This is your primary window for high-damage combos.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Stack Ren">
    Your goal is to land the "Ren" move. Each hit increases the pressure, and the third hit often results in a massive health drop for the enemy.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Utilize I-Frames">
    If the opponent attempts a counter-attack or a high-damage ultimate, use your I-frame move to negate the damage and reposition.
  </Step>
</Steps>

| Move Name | Range | Effect | Cooldown |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Ren** | Melee/Mid | **Massive Damage** | Medium |
| **Eye Laser** | Long | Projectile Damage | Short |
| **Blade Stun** | Mid | **Stun Lock** | Medium |
| **Spirit Dash** | Movement | I-Frame/Dash | Long |

<Callout type="warning" title="Combat Warning">
Do not waste your I-frame move early in a fight. Against stands like Dio, saving your invincibility for their Time Stop or heavy finishers is the difference between winning and losing.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="PvP Matchup Strategy 2026">

The current 2026 meta features several challenging stands. When playing as **bizarre lineage anubis**, your strategy must adapt based on your opponent's range and utility.

| Opponent | Threat Level | Key Strategy |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Purple Haze** | Medium | Stay out of the poison range; use long-range moves. |
| **White Snake** | High | Bait the long-range stun; adapt to their aggressive chasing. |
| **Dio** | **Extreme** | Save I-frames for Time Stop; pressure before they stop time. |
| **White Snake (PvE)** | Low | Focus on slash damage scaling to out-DPS their utility. |

When fighting a **White Snake** user, be wary of their aggressive playstyle. They will often chase you down to leave you wide open. Use your long-range moves to punish their aggression. Against **Dio**, the fight is a battle of patience. You are the underdog due to their Time Stop, but your superior damage scaling allows you to win if you can survive their initial burst.

<Callout type="success" title="Victory Tip">
Anubis is particularly strong against "mouth breathers" or players who rely on simple, predictable patterns. Use your mobility to stay unpredictable and punish their mistakes with a quick stun-into-Ren combo.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Progression Checklist & Goals">

To reach the pinnacle of Anubis mastery, follow this checklist to ensure your character and gear are optimized for the 2026 competitive season.

<Checklist
  id="anubis-mastery"
  title="Anubis Mastery Milestones:"
  items={[
    "Obtain a weapon with at least 20% Slash Damage bonus",
    "Master the timing of the I-frame move against Dio's Time Stop",
    "Successfully land a 3-stack Ren combo in a ranked match",
    "Confirm your weapon scaling stats with the training dummy",
    "Reach Max Level to optimize cooldown reduction"
  ]}
/>

<Callout type="tip" title="Final Recommendation">
Always prioritize weapon upgrades over minor stand stat tweaks. The scaling on the **bizarre lineage anubis** is so significant that a better sword will always outperform a few extra points in Stand Power.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Map} title="Frequently Asked Questions">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "Does Anubis really scale off the equipped weapon?",
    answer: "Yes, it has been confirmed by moderators and community testing. Anubis scales off weapon damage and specifically benefits from Slash damage modifiers."
  },
  {
    question: "What is the 'I win' button for Anubis?",
    answer: "The move 'Ren' is often called the win button. If you manage to land it three times during a fight, the damage is usually enough to defeat almost any opponent."
  },
  {
    question: "How do I deal with Purple Haze's poison as an Anubis user?",
    answer: "The best strategy is to stay out of the poison's range. Anubis has three long-range moves that allow you to deal damage safely from a distance."
  },
  {
    question: "Is Anubis better for PvE or PvP?",
    answer: "While it is highly effective in PvP due to its stuns and range, its high slash damage scaling makes it excellent for high-level PvE bosses like Akira as well."
  }
]} />

</Section>
